text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Brian. That was some incredible running.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Brian. That was some incredible running.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It sure felt like it. That might've been the best I've ever done.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: After all, it was the most I've ever wanted to win.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I think the last couple of races pushed you to grow in a way the
victories didn't.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I think the last couple of races pushed you to grow in a way the
victories didn't.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I'm not going to stop here. My urge to run is what I'll use to
propel me forward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ahead of me is where my sister's waiting. She's the person I still need
to defeat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell she really means it—her eyes shine passionately as she
speaks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So, when's my next race? I'm starving!
